base_context.description: The next run will be this leader/base config plus ONLY the JSON changes returned by the advisor.

expected_direction: reduce tail MAE without materially reducing net profit or trade count
expected_effect: Should reduce or isolate the remaining -527 charm_pin_pullback_long tail while preserving most fast charm-pin winners. Tradeoff is a small loss of profitable extended charm-pin recoveries if the high-extension box overlaps more than expected; reject if total PnL retention falls below 98% or fast_under_15m drops by more than 3.
label: charm-pin-high-extension-tail-box
rationale: Use one surgical-veto/runtime-risk family: refine the already accepted charm-pin tail-risk box instead of repeating failed 1DTE, fallback, call-wall, or broad entry-pruning experiments. The current leader's main defect is hidden heat, and the worst trade is a VALID_0DTE charm_pin_pullback_long threshold-box case: VWAP distance 26.20, rolling-high distance 14.75, pullback 9.75, weak RSI slope, ADX under 18, and -527 MAE. Prior charm-pin tail-box changes improved score and net profit, so this is the highest-evidence next move, but scoped tightly to avoid blocking protected extended-VWAP winners.
